creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
the "web" page is based on the manual page man5/dtterm.5.gz

The troff source code is:

\f(CWF34 (R14)\fP^G\fIEsc\fP \fB[ 1 2
1 z\fP

so, the man.cgi script displays the manual page correctly.

I don't know if the manual page is correct or wrong, I leave this to the ports maintainer.
